summary: Stellar recording of an electrifying show with Jerry on fire and standout performances of Music Never Stopped, China Cat Sunflower/I Know You Rider, and a monster Other One>Goin' Down The Road>Saturday Night.
review: The reviewer raves about the concert’s raw energy, calling it comparable only to Red Rocks, and highlights Jerry Garcia’s blazing playing throughout. Standout moments include a superb Music Never Stopped opener, a sizzling China Cat Sunflower/I Know You Rider pair, and an epic Other One>Goin' Down The Road>Saturday Night sequence. The recording itself is described as “stellar,” implying excellent sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, highly enthusiastic review praises both the musical performance and the audio fidelity, suggesting an outstanding show captured with great recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording “stellar” with no complaints about clarity or mix.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower / I Know You Rider
The Other One > Goin' Down The Road Feelin' Bad > Saturday Night
show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy flow praised throughout; opener builds momentum and the second set delivers a powerful, seamless sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as ON FIRE the whole show.
band_member_comments.Bob: Initially seemed to lack the venue’s electrical energy but quickly ‘gets it right’ and delivers superb songs in both sets.
